feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAC Excel MEMERPROPERTY not returning Description
entry.content:
I have a number of Excel files setup using the SAP.MEMBERPROPERTY function to label rows and columns.
Today I am finding that previously working cells now give me a #VALUE! error in Excel with the SAC Excel Add-in.

For example:
=SAP.MEMBERPROPERTY(DS_1, "Measures", "qty_u", "Description")
This used to return the Description of my measure "Unit Qty" - today I get #VALUE!
=SAP.MEMBERPROPERTY(DS_1, "Measures", "qty_u", "Name")
Still returns "qty_u" as it previously did

=SAP.MEMBERPROPERTY(DS_1, "Version", "public.2024FC", "firstPlanDate")
works and returns my custom property as defined in the dimension tables in the modeler

=SAP.MEMBERPROPERTY(DS_1, "Version", "public.2024FC", "Description")
used to return "2024FC" but now results in a #VALUE! error in excel

 

Has something changed? SAC update? Add-in Update?

What am I missing here - being able to pull in the Description from my Account dimensions, measures, versions, etc. was a huge time savings in some report setups I have been using for several months.

Thanks

entry.title: SAC story page filter default selection with Button Script
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a scenario for one our story where we would like to filter only on Version with Property ( Start_Period) which has date values in it.

Example: Version Dimension

 

 

 

We have story which we need to display with the only column with:

 

 

We are trying to fix story filter with Date and Version Property (Start_Period) and getting an error while running the button with the below script.

var selections = Table_1.getDataSource().getDataSelections();
var member = PlanningModel_1.getMember("Version",selections[0]["Version"]);
var prop = member.properties;
var planning = Table_1.getPlanning();
var SM1 = prop["Start_Period"];
var dateparam = "[Date].[FYP].&[" +SM1+ "]";

 

//Table_1.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Date","[Date].[FYP].&[202401]");
Table_1.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Date",dateparam);

 

There are no errors in script, however when we run Button it throws an error as below:

 

Please advise.

Regards,

Ram

entry.title: SAC - Signflip in Calculation of Previous Years Values
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

we have a problem in SAP Analytics Cloud, data modeling with the Signflip of EXP-Accounts. 

Situation

We have an Account-Dimension with a Sign-Flip-Property, which should enable different signs for the EXP-Accounts (Sign Flip for Base Amount shows the Costs as a positive value / Sign Flip for Management shows Costs as a negative Amount). 

This works well, as decribed in the Documentation (SAP Help Portal). Also for the Calculation (Row 3 - Calculation of "Direct Margin = Revenue - Direct Cost of Sales") it works fine, after setting the right Priorities for the Calculation. Exmaple see Screenshot below. 

Problem

We need to calculate the Previous Year Values. But here the Signflip "destroys" the calculation when it comes to the time navigation. 

The first 2 Columns (green) are correct ans also the result (Direct Margin) is calculated correctly.

  • LC (no Signflip) shows always positive Values
  • LC shows Cost as negative Values

In the last Column (red) we can see the problem for the previous Year Calculation:

  • LC - (PY) does show the Cost as negative value, but the calculation of Direct Margin is wrong (it adds the 2 Accounts above). I would expect 2,960k - 2,178k = 782k as a direct margin. Like in the middle column for LC. 

Background

New Model Type, optimized Story. 

LC (no Signflip) - is the Measure in the Import-Model. 

LC - is a calculated Measure to reflect the signflip:

 

LC - (PY) - is a calculated measure to get the previous year value from LC (only Actuals):

 

It would be great if someone can help here! 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: SAC / Optimized Story/ Hide Parent total values in sac
entry.content:
Dear Community,

Is there a way to hide the parent totals in a table? Only the child values are relevant for this tabble but it is aggregating the values

Many thanks for your hints!

Attila

entry.title: Need Blob to text conversion in Data Sphere
entry.content:
Hi folks,

I have table in S/4 hana STXl to store the long text for all other tables which i am using it in Data sphere to get text but i am failing to convert the clustd value  TO_CHAR(TO_NCLOB(TO_BINARY('FF06020102028000343130330000000063010000121F9D0232663E060606461E20C1C0CA80058430F8307832F831B832AC85A85C05166601538C1CEB2082FBA0', 'HEX'))) text but it was giving an error for conversion.

 

 

Could anyone please help me here to convert this in data sphere or any suggestion would be helpful.

entry.title: Data Access Control in Modeler in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi all,


Is it possible to have Data Access Control for data from model on SAC with same approach as we have in Datasphere? Model on SAC is with imported data not via live connection.


I have concept of authorization based on dimensions with so many values and there is so many users. For example, each Project Manager should see data only for one or more Projects, but dimension Project has over 5000 values and it's not possible to maintain it manually like on the screenshot below.

And this is not only issue, but many Users have more than one dimension that his authorizations are based on. Is it possible to implement this concept of data access control in SAC? Below is preview of authorization concept from Datasphere.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Is it Possible in SAC to split a line chart into multiple charts based on a dimension?
entry.content:
So using Sales as a measure with Time as the X axis dimension trend.

Now want to see this trend split into multiple charts based on an additional dimension, "Product" for example

entry.title: SAC Hyperlink doesn't show Account dimension
entry.content:
Hi folks,

When attempting to link to an external URL, Account is not appearing as a selectable dimension despite being present in the model & table we are using to link from.

We would like to avoid needing to solve this through scripting, as this seems like something that should be achievable through the normal functionality, just like all of the other dimensions.
Is it the case that Account is not available in hyperlinks for some reason? If so, why?

entry.title: SAC - Calculated Dimension in Modeler
entry.content:
Greetings,

Does the possibility exist to create a calculated dimension in the modeler itself similar to how we can create calculated dimensions in stories?

The drawback with calculated dimensions in stories is that they are not accessible to other stories or in the excel add-in.

The drawback with calculated columns in import jobs is that if parameters are updated, a reload of historical data is needed, so it's pretty static.

Is there another option to have the following with changing attribute members and not needing to reload historical data?

1. New dimension 3 calculated based on the below logic:

  1. If attribute 1 of dimension 1 is not blank, attribute 1 of dimension 1. Else
  2. If attribute 1 of dimension 2 is not blank, attribute 1 of dimension 2. Else
  3. dimension 

Thank you for your help.

entry.title: I want to know the source of my datasets seen in S4HANA import connection
entry.content: We usually work with S4HANA live connections for all data models built in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). Recently when I was creating datasets, I could see a lot of views listed under the import connection (see attached). I am not sure what is the source of data for these tables or views. Any pointers to the actual source of data. We need to understand the validity of data in these tables (when were they last loaded/refreshed). Without knowing the actual source, I am not able to answer the data validity questions. Thanks,

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - Sum
entry.content:
Greetings experts,

I'm working on a project on SAP Analytics Cloud which requires me to put certain values in a table. These values are fed through a live BW connection and that in turn takes the values from a consumption cds view I created.

The issue I am facing lies in the fact that the report i'm trying to create with dynamically change according to a date input filter I have put in place. When filtering for a single PO and for a date range there might be more than one value being fed to the the table and causing SAC to hide the values.

So my question is there any way I can sum all values being returned to the table and then since its already filtering the dates, it would dynamically change said sum?

 

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Is there any possible way to do a calculation in SAC using two different measures from diff models ?
entry.content: SAC Calculation = measure1 (Model 01) / measure2 (Model 02)

entry.title: How to Create Deeplinks by using Specific Tab URL in ODE Stories?
entry.content:
I am seeking support  with something is so basic but there is no clear guidance.

I would like to use hyperlinks or Deeplink in the e-mails  or MS Office file to link tabs in specific stories.  The issue is in the ODE(Optimized Design Experience) stories,  tabs don't have specific URL every tab  has same URL within the stories. Therefore I can not create deeplinks.

The right question would be how can I get the actual URL of tabs within the a story. In this way I am able to create deeplinks in e-mail or other documents.

It would be great, if you can help.

Best Regards.

#SAC #OptimizedDesignExperience #Hyperlink #Deeplink #Story

Ali

entry.title: SAC Script needed to retrive the selected values of a Hierachie filter parameter/variable
entry.content:
SAC Script needed to retrive the selected values of a Hierachy filter parameter/variable

-got a BW Query,
-the BW Query got a Companycode with a Hierarchy,
- the Companycode Hierachy is for example:
Country Companycode
----------+---------------------
DE        2150
DE        2222
DE       .........
AT         8010
AT        8020
AT        .....
...
REST  1001
REST  1002
REST  ....


The query got a Customer Exit Hierachy Node Variable ZHIERNODEMULTI
for multiple values.

I need  to get the values of selected nodes of the customer exit varable ZHIERNODEMULTI

in a script:
What means in the sample the values of the 0HIERODE :  AT &  DE. 

Anybody got a fitting script ?

Thank You !

Best Martin

entry.title: Performance Issue After Converting SAC Stories to Optimized Design Experience
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

I'm sharing an issue we encountered regarding the conversion of SAC stories from the classic design to the optimized design experience.

Tools:

  • BW4HANA  
  • SAP Analytics Cloud (Live Model connection)

 

Issue:

After performing the recommended conversions, we began to notice a decline in performance in the converted stories. Where previously they took only a few seconds to load, the initial load time has now increased significantly.

Has anyone else identified a similar case? Are there known possible causes?

Thank you!

 

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Remove indentation in Hierarchy SAC
entry.content:
Hi,

 Is it possible in SAC to remove indentation in hierarchies?

Thanks

entry.title: #SAC Set dimension filter value from a dashboard with hierarchy to another table
entry.content:
Hello experts

I have a dashboards where I use an item hierarchy: when I click it I want to pass the selected value to another table (using same model) , to have as result the table filtered with the item selected from first dashboard.

I did many attempts but without result.

I created a similar script over "On select" function of first dashboard:

var sel = Chart_7.getSelections()[0];  // Chart_7 is the first dashboard

Table_10.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("dimItems", "[dimItems].[HryItemcode].[dimItems.ItemCodeMaster]");   // Table_10 is the receiver dashboard

What should I do to achieve the desidered result?

Thank you so much for your help

Adriano

entry.title: #SAC Dynamic percentage calculation in table
entry.content:
Hello experts,

In SAC I have this kind of table where there at max 3 rows, and I want to calculate dinamically the variance % of the last row (in this case 2024 turnover) compared to preview one (in this case 2024 forecast)

I tried to add a row where I calculated in this moment in the formula bar what I need and it works, BUT, this table is dynamic because I can filter with a story filter the year, so in this case I selected 2024, but if select 2023 as example, the table correctly refreshes but the added row is completely wrong.

Does it exist a way to implement this and how? Alternatively how could I approch this matter?

Thank you

Adriano

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - Get Value by Data Action
entry.content:
Hi friends,

I have a scenario where I have a dummy data row called "Holder," and I want to copy its values to valid data rows. Please see the table below:

Current State     
Dimension 1Dimension 2 Dimension 3 Dimension 4 Dimension 5 Amount (Measure)
      
Holder####150.000
A1B1C1D1E1 
A2B2C2D2E2 
A3B3C3D3E3 
A4B4C4D4E4 
      
      
Desired Outcome    
      
Dimension 1Dimension 2 Dimension 3 Dimension 4 Dimension 5 Amount (Measure)
      
Holder####150.000
A1B1C1D1E1150.000
A2B2C2D2E2150.000
A3B3C3D3E3150.000
A4B4C4D4E4150.000

I've tried various data action coding techniques but haven't achieved the desired outcome. When I use DATA(Dim1=A1)=Resultlookup(Dim1=Holder, Dim2=#), it generates a dataset for every available master data entry. On the other hand, using FOREACH.Booked doesn't work either, as the master data is used in other data rows as well and therefore generates again unvalid data rows

Does anyone have any suggestions?

@N1kh1l

entry.title: Is there a way to apply a selection from a filter in another filter in SAC?
entry.content:
Is there a way to apply a selection (value) made from a page filter applied in another filter in SAC OVM?

If I select ABC in InputControl 1, I want that same value of ABC applied in InputControl 2.

Thank you!
